payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Dark stained wooden side table with a rectangular glossy top and straight square leg, lower shelf holding a woven basket and visible clutter on top (magazines, a small potted plant and a remote); the right side is partially edge-cropped and the table sits directly beside a dark leather sofa — estimated distance ~0.6 m from camera.
